title: editon's Modpack
description: A Modpack that aim to find a balance between optimization mods (Optifine like) + QOL (Quality of Life) with a small Vanilla + (Action and Stuff) feeling.
body:
![Logo for discription](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3fa686cf40c0860d6472c3c805faa1057e245ea.png)

## This Modpack are built on Fabric and should work with Quilt too!

I keep that up to date and add over the time other mods.

![Why should I use that Modpack?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d6092728d00927a72035307cd21c7d95583a790.jpeg)

![Motivation Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddb644a1e34a0d5190146d3f076e11c5adc948de.jpeg)

It was Originally created for a Minecraft Server Project I'm working on for a cobble of years alone. But I want to share this, so here we are! This pack is inspired by Modpacks that make optimizations.

The main motivation for creating this Optimization / Vanilla Plus / QOL Modpack is to enhance the Minecraft experience for me, the community, and for sharing the joy of discovery with others while keeping it true to its roots.

If you want to contact me send a Mail to editon96(at)pm.me

Basic settings explanation

This Modpack is pre-configured for a setup for min. 5 GB of ram on a Mid-PC to get the 60 fps. I test it with my Potato Pc. It works with that too.

Worked with: + **Nvidea 710m and Intel Core 3230m** + **RTX 2070 Super and Ryzen 7 3800x**

I have an **AMD Radeon RX 9070xt** and a **AMD Ryzen 9 5950x** and test it with that. I get my Launcher 16 GB of Ram.

Feel free to change the Settings form the Game to get that what you want.

![Links Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39aaf3aef136f5061fabb50ab646740fab2812b1.jpeg) Here is a List with Mods and other that are In use and need to be linked. - Xaero's Minimap - https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap - Xaero's World Map -https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map - Terralith - https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith (1) - Structory - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory (1) - Structory Towers - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory-towers (1) - Nullscape - https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape (1) - Incendium - https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium (1) - Continents - https://modrinth.com/datapack/continents (1) - Essential Mod - https://essential.gg/download (2) - Fancy Menu - https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu - Better Third Person - https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person - Client Tweaks - https://modrinth.com/mod/client-tweaks - Hold my Iteams - https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items - ImmersiveUI - https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui - Improved Crash Reports - https://modrinth.com/mod/improvedcrashreports - Just Enought Book - https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbook - Simpel Voice Chat - https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat - Sounds - https://modrinth.com/mod/sound - Fresh Animations - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations - Third Person (f5) - https://modrinth.com/mod/thirdperson - Worldedit CUI - https://github.com/EngineHub/WorldEditCUI (used only in the 1.19.x versions) - Zoomify - https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify (not in use since 0.2.3) - Simpel Menu - https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-menu (not in use since 1.0.0) - FOG - https://modrinth.com/mod/fog (not in use since 1.0.4) ## Recommendations
Spoiler

Hall of FAME

+ FreshLX - https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX + YUNGS STUFF - https://modrinth.com/organization/refresh-studios
Important words: - Simple Voice Chat (should be also on the Server to work), if you don't need them deactivate it! - If you want to use your Texture pack, add them over the default pack in the load order - WATCH OUT IF YOU UPDATE to newer versions, it can happen that your WORLD BRICKS, so make backups! - It exists problems with Friends and Foes on some multiplayer Servers, deactivate them if you're on 1.20.x and have problems with connection ### Legend: (1) Stardust Labs: https://www.stardustlabs.net/downloads

(2) BUT DON'T BUY Cosmetics, you can get it in other way by searching ;)

[V+] - Vanilla +; [-M] - No playing on Multiplayer Server beside the Essentials hosted (you); [O] - Optimization; [-S] - Not all shaders are Working; [F] - FUN
